context: Contract section-2-input-ui--section-3-output-and-errors offers two valid forms: (a) DOM 'input' event on the textarea, (b) exposed callback registration onLatexChange(cb). Builders must pick one and document it.
decision: Pick exposed callback registration: window.inputUi.onLatexChange(cb). The textarea also fires the standard 'input' event (free side-effect), so consumers using either form will work.
rationale: A named module function makes integration auditable and the consumer's subscription explicit. The DOM event still fires naturally so we get both forms.
nested_equivalent: In nested mode, the section-2 builder would document this choice in its handoff package; section-3 consumer would read it and adapt.
